Allnodes Features

Masternodes & Validator Nodes
Setup in minutes and earn attractive rewards directly to your wallet when you host on Allnodes. We’ll back you up with our multilayered monitoring systems that ensure your node remains online at all times.
Sentry Nodes
Secure your Validator node. Requesting data is unavailable. Carries no reward.
Full Nodes
The fastest and easiest setup for blockchain Full Nodes with unlimited, complimentary updates and maximum uptime. Available in 15 cities worldwide. Carries no reward.
Staking
Collect interest on assets available on our site while keeping your coin in your wallet.
Address monitoring
Monitor your masternode and staking rewards of any address from the available list of coins on our site.
Allnodes Bot
Get ongoing updates on your node performance through Telegram, Discord and Slack.

Allnodes news

Apr 25, 2024
Allnodes joined Automata Network AVS as a reliable and secure Operator on EigenLayer Mainnet! Automata extends machine trust to Ethereum with TEE Coprocessors. Its Multi-Prover AVS enables rollup systems to bootstrap decentralized TEE Committees and harden security.
Apr 17, 2024
More updates in store! AltLayer now live on EigenLayer mainnet, with steadfast support from Allnodes AVS operator. Here’s to a bright future ahead, team! 🎆
Stake & Restake here: https://www.allnodes.com/eth/staking
Apr 12, 2024
Exciting news yet again! Brevis is live on EigenLayer mainnet coupled with Allnodes AVS operator support. To the bright future, team🥂
Stake & Restake here: https://www.allnodes.com/eth/staking
Apr 12, 2024
Always honored to support the first movers in the space! Witness Chain, Allnodes AVS operator is behind you every step of the way. Congrats and bonne voyage!🚀
Stake & Restake here: https://www.allnodes.com/eth/staking
Apr 10, 2024
It's a Big Day for the Ethereum community! The EigenLayer mainnet is live, & Allnodes operator is ready for your delegations! Let the games begin!
🏁 Delegate to Allnodes: https://app.eigenlayer.xyz/operator/0x529ec9ac...336616f543
More news

Ready to get started?

Check out Allnodes, or sign up for a free account to start staking or hosting right away. We will also work with you to design a customized quote for your business needs.

Start nowContact sales
